emails.subject: Data Purchase Successful
emails.snippet: Data Purchase Successful Dear ROSELINE AKINJO, We are happy to inform you that the Data purchase you made has been successfully processed, and the amount has been debited from your account. - Debit

emails.subject: Debit alert!
emails.snippet: Hi ROSELINE, We wish to inform you that a debit transaction occurred on your account with us. Debit Amount 1000.00
